label: Synthetic individual renter next-election ATT
target_population: renters represented in the synthetic longitudinal fixture who experience a measurable rise in housing-cost burden
exposure: transition from below to above a predeclared housing-cost-burden threshold
contrast: observed outcome under transition versus counterfactual outcome without transition for exposed renters
outcome: support for a locally classified party family at the next synthetic election
horizon: first election within 24 months after exposure transition
aggregation_level: individual probability difference, aggregated as ATT
interference_assumptions: No direct spillover between synthetic households in the reference fixture.
attrition_policy: Synthetic fixture contains deterministic attrition flags; analyses must report complete-case and bounded sensitivity results.
